briefdescription.para: Documentation for the core edge implementation.

sect1.title: Introduction
sect1.para: Edges in AnalysisG represent connections or relationships between nodes (particles) in an event graph. The framework supports various topologies for edge construction.

sect1.title: Topology
sect1.para: The edge topology defines which nodes are connected. Common topologies include:

listitem.para: Fully connected: Every node connected to every other node
Custom topology: User-defined connection rules based on physics criteria
k-nearest neighbors: Connections based on distance metrics

sect1.title: Edge Index
sect1.para:
Edges are represented using a 2xN tensor where:
Row 0 contains source node indices
Row 1 contains target node indices
This format is compatible with PyTorch Geometric conventions.
